hypothesis: Stronger soft-dedup (14-day window, 0.15 penalty) reduces consecutive-day list overlap and raises weekly unique / NEW share on Skills digests, while still ranking by 7-day momentum so the list stays about discovery of real activity.
change_summary: Tighten soft-dedup for Skills digests only: DIGEST_SOFT_DEDUP_BRIEFINGS=14 and DIGEST_SOFT_DEDUP_PENALTY=0.15 (defaults today: 5 and 0.5).
notes: Queued behind EXP-20260701-landing-layout and EXP-20260716-firecrawl-enrich-skills — do not start baseline until both complete (~2026-08-14). Also requires EXP-20260628-web-enrich-skills complete (Skills digest: one treatment at a time). Backlog: RANK-2. Baseline planned 2026-08-15. METRIC PRIORITY (low traffic): (1) PRIMARY — structural diversity from digest.json: mean consecutive-day overlap, unique repos / 7 days, share of is_new in top 10. Decide keep/revert mainly on these. Success bar (suggested): overlap down ≥15pp vs baseline. (2) SECONDARY — PostHog outbound_repo_click (edition=skills) and pageviews. Keep collecting for future signal; do not treat sparse clicks as a pass/fail gate while engagement is low. Note click/CTR trends in the verdict for later. If primary diversity under-delivers, plan Experiment B (discovery-slot quota) separately. Treatment: set DIGEST_SOFT_DEDUP_BRIEFINGS=14 and DIGEST_SOFT_DEDUP_PENALTY=0.15 on the Skills digest step in digest.yml; leave OSS at defaults. Import snapshots via npm run experiment -- snapshot after each window.
